Poor service from the beach attendants at 10:00 PM on Wednesday.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención incluso de madrugada, adheridos a la promoción de YPF q descuenta el 5% en combustible pagando con la app entre las 00:00 y las 06 h. sumado a q tienen en este momento el mejor precio en mercado junto con Axión hace una gran diferencia a la hora de llenar el tanque.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service even in the early hours, participating in the YPF promotion that offers a 5% discount on fuel when paying with the app between midnight and 6 a.m. Plus, they currently have the best prices on the market along with Axion, making a big difference when filling up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tZeVZuQmxObUl3WW5GdVVrdHhPR1pvZGxORlFVRRAB

reviews.comment:
Extrañamente fio el domingo pasado. Y parecia cerrada. Luces apagadas, nade en la playa de carga. Nunca me pasó. Baje del auto a ver si habia servicio y apareció un empleado de la nada que me atendio bárbaro. Pero nunca pense q una Ypf estuviera tan apagada en pleno Olivos con la shelf y axion pegadas y bien activas. Esto fue a las 11.30 AM

(Translated by Google)
Strangely, I went there last Sunday. And it seemed closed. Lights off, I was standing in the fueling area. That's never happened to me before. I got out of the car to see if they were open and an employee appeared out of nowhere and gave me great service. But I never imagined a YPF station would be so closed in the middle of Olivos, with the Shelf and Axion stations right next to it and fully operational. This was at 11:30 AM
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xWT2JIUkVhVlpwTUdSMVVtNVVOVVZuU0ROMlRrRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buenas y cómodas instalaciones para cargar combustible y tomar un café, como socio creo que se pueden hacer algunos trámites. Yo uso la App del ACA y es útil.

(Translated by Google)
Good and convenient facilities for refueling and getting a coffee; as a member, I think some paperwork can be done there. I use the ACA app and it's useful.

reviewReply.comment: Buenas tardes muchas gracias por tu buena opinion :)
